results.title: Lindy Boggs redevelopment plans take another step forward, demolition set for July
results.description: The decades-long effort to demolish the former Lindy Boggs Medical Center took another step forward Tuesday after a City Council committee advanced a lease agreement to build and maintain a stormwater retention tank underneath the site.

EBRD Invests In Sustainability-linked Bond Issued By Romanian Autonom
results.description: Bank’s investment supports the development of Romania’s capital market and the decarbonisation of the transport sector By Vanora Bennett The European Bank for Reconstruction and Development (EBRD) is investing €6.7 million in a €30 million sustainability-linked bond issued by Autonom, a Romanian car leasing and rental company. The Bank’s investment will support Autonom’s sustainable growth [...]
